cases.context: The customer included the order number, confirmed the box is still sealed, and asked whether they should mail the product back now.

input.customer_issue: Wants a refund for an unopened herb grinder purchased 18 days ago.
input.goal: Confirm whether the refund is allowed and explain the exact next step.
input.policy_snippet: Refunds are available within 30 calendar days for unused accessories in original packaging with proof of purchase. Refunds must be approved by support before return shipment.

cases.notes: Checks that the reply approves the path but does not tell the customer to ship the product back before support approval.
cases.title: Refund for unopened accessory within policy window

cases.context: Jordan already sent the tracking number and is a premium customer with a verified billing address on file.

input.customer_issue: Has a tracking number that has shown no movement for six days and wants a replacement shipped immediately.
input.goal: Acknowledge the delay, explain the claim process, and clarify when a replacement can be sent.
input.policy_snippet: If tracking shows no carrier movement for 5 days, support may open a carrier claim. Premium customers may receive a replacement after address verification and claim creation.

cases.notes: Checks that the reply does not promise an immediate replacement.
cases.title: Premium customer with stalled tracking

cases.context: Leah says the charger light stays red and the device never reaches a full charge. She has the original order confirmation.

input.customer_issue: Reports that a battery stopped charging after four months and wants to know whether it can be replaced.
input.goal: Explain the warranty path and what evidence support needs before approving a replacement.
input.policy_snippet: Battery defects reported within 6 months may qualify for warranty replacement after troubleshooting and photo or video verification. Consumable wear, water damage, and unauthorized modifications are excluded.

cases.notes: Checks that the reply frames this as review/qualification, not guaranteed approval.
cases.title: Battery failure within warranty review window

description: Core production checks for refund, shipment, and warranty handling.
name: Support Policy Core
